input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.5.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.5.5
            TITLE: for lithium based cells,

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.5.5: For lithium based cells,
EV.7.5.5 For lithium based cells, 
a. The temperature of a minimum of 20% of the cells must be monitored by the AMS  
b. The monitored cells must be equally distributed inside the Accumulator Container(s)  
Every cell temperature should be monitored

final_answer: rule EV.7.5.5: For lithium based cells, EV.7.5.5 For lithium based cells, a. The temperature of a minimum of 20% of the cells must be monitored by the AMS b. The monitored cells must be equally distributed inside the Accumulator Container(s) Every cell temperature should be monitored
